template:
{{if eq .schedule.schedule_outcome "approve"}}
### ✅ Pickup Schedule Confirmed

The SLTB Officer has approved the pickup schedule and assigned a Tea Inspector.

* **Visit Date**: `{{.schedule.visit_date}}`
* **Time**: `{{.schedule.visit_time}}`
* **Tea Inspector**: **{{.schedule.inspector_name}}** ({{.schedule.contact_number}})
* **Status**: Schedule Confirmed — Please proceed to acknowledge
{{else if .schedule.reschedule_feedback}}
### ⚠️ Reschedule Requested

The SLTB Officer has requested a new pickup date/time.

> **Officer Feedback**: *"{{.schedule.reschedule_feedback}}"*

Please suggest a new date and time below.
{{else if .suggest.suggested_date}}
### ⏳ Awaiting Officer Review

Your suggested pickup schedule has been submitted. The SLTB Officer will review and assign an inspector.

* **Your Suggested Date**: `{{.suggest.suggested_date}}`
* **Your Suggested Time**: `{{.suggest.suggested_time}}`
* **Status**: Awaiting SLTB Officer Review
{{else}}
### 📅 Action Required: Suggest Pickup Schedule

Please suggest a preferred date and time for the SLTB Tea Inspector to visit your warehouse.

* **Status**: Awaiting Your Suggestion
{{end}}
